title: not only... but (also)...（連接詞組）

formulas.zh: 不僅A而且B；連接相同詞性的成分，強調B比A更重要

formulas.formula: Not only + 助動詞 + S + V..., but (also) + S + V...
formulas.zh: 置於句首時，主句採倒裝語序，強調句子的強烈對比

explanation: not only...but also用於連接具相同詞性的語法成分（名詞、動詞、形容詞等），強調兩項事物都成立且後者更重要。當置於句首時，主句必須倒裝，即助動詞提前至主詞之前。此句型常見於學測，用於強調複合訊息。注意：but also中的also可省略，but 必須保留；倒裝時需確認主詞與動詞時態一致；不能與單純的and混淆。

examples.eng: Not only did he finish the project, but he also exceeded all expectations.
examples.chi: 他不僅完成了這個專案，而且超越了所有人的期望。

examples.eng: This book is not only educational but also highly entertaining for readers.
examples.chi: 這本書不僅具教育意義，而且對讀者來說也相當有趣。

examples.eng: Not only does she speak English fluently, but she also masters three other languages.
examples.chi: 她不僅英文說得流利，而且還精通其他三種語言。

examples.eng: The program benefits not only the students but also the teachers and parents.
examples.chi: 這個計畫不僅造福學生，而且也造福教師和家長。

extension.tip: 句首倒裝時務必確認：(1)助動詞必須前置於主詞；(2)主詞後的動詞應使用原形（do/does/did）；(3)but also後的主詞若與前面不同，需重複或代詞指代。平時應將倒裝結構與原序結構相互轉換練習。

examples.test: ❌ Not only he finished the work, but he also helped others.
examples.result: → ✓ Not only did he finish the work, but he also helped others.（助動詞did必須前置）

examples.test: ❌ She is not only hardworking and also talented.
examples.result: → ✓ She is not only hardworking but also talented.（必須用but，不用and）

examples.test: ✓ Not only are the flowers beautiful, but they also bloom year-round.
examples.result: → 現在式倒裝，助動詞are前置，主詞flowers後接動詞原形

extension.note: 置句首倒裝：『助動詞提前，主詞隨後，動詞變原形』；平序連接則『名詞/形容詞/動詞對應，but也必須用』。

parts: she master Chinese, but she also speaks Japanese fluently.
exercises.sentence: Not only does she master Chinese, but she also speaks Japanese fluently.
exercises.translation: 她不僅掌握中文，而且還能流利地說日文。

parts: challenging but also rewarding for the team.
exercises.sentence: This project is not only challenging but also rewarding for the team.
exercises.translation: 這個專案不僅對團隊具挑戰性，而且也很有回報。

parts: the concert impressive, but it also raised awareness for charity.
exercises.sentence: Not only was the concert impressive, but it also raised awareness for charity.
exercises.translation: 音樂會不僅令人印象深刻，而且還為慈善事業提升了認知。

parts: The new policy benefits not only employees
exercises.sentence: The new policy benefits not only employees but also the company's reputation.
exercises.translation: 新政策不僅使員工受益，而且也提升了公司的聲譽。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適合的連接詞組，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: This restaurant is _______ delicious _______ affordable for families.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。not only...but also用於連接相同詞性的成分（此處為形容詞delicious和affordable），強調兩項特點都成立。B錯誤因為but也是必須保留的連接詞；C的both...and雖可連接形容詞，但無法表達「後者更重要」的強調效果；D的or表示選擇關係，語意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 句首倒裝結構，選擇正確的助動詞與語序
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ the students understand the concept, _______ the teachers were impressed by their progress.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。當not only置於句首時，主句須倒裝，助動詞did應提前至主詞students之前，表過去時態。but also是正確的連接詞組。B的do與過去文脈不符；C的and無法連接兩個獨立子句且不符not only句型；D的do時態錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型與時態搭配，辨別正確的倒裝與連接
mc_exercises.question_eng: Not only _______ she completed the assignment ahead of schedule, _______ she also provided innovative solutions that impressed the entire team.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B。句子使用過去式（completed）表過去事件，倒裝時助動詞應為did。連接詞組必須用but also（also可省略為but，但此處保留更完整）。A的has與過去事件不符；C的would表推測，語意不當；D的does時態與前文不一致，且句中已有also不應重複。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 進階題：多層次連接與詞性混合的精確應用
mc_exercises.question_eng: The documentary _______ reveals hidden truths _______ challenges viewers' preconceptions is not only _______ compelling but also _______ thought-provoking.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A。第一空用that引導限制性關係子句；第二空用and連接兩個並列動詞短語（reveals和challenges）；第三、四空用副詞（extremely和genuinely）修飾形容詞，搭配not only...but also強調兩個特質。B的but無法連接動詞短語；C的quite無法與incredibly級副詞等效搭配；D的or表選擇，which引導非限制性子句皆不符。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這部電影不僅很有趣，而且還很感人。
translation_exercises.answer: Not only is this movie entertaining, but (also) it is very touching.
key_points: Not only + 助動詞 is + 主詞 倒裝結構
形容詞 entertaining 和 touching 的對等連接
hints: 提示1：句首 not only 須倒裝，助動詞 is 提前至主詞 movie 之前
提示2：also 可省略但 but 不可省；兩個形容詞詞性相同

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這位老師不僅講課有趣，而且對學生很有耐心。
translation_exercises.answer: Not only does this teacher teach in an entertaining way, but (also) she is very patient with students.
key_points: 助動詞 does 與現在簡單式的倒裝搭配
講課方式和耐心的不同詞性成分（短語 vs 形容詞）
but (also) 子句時態與主句一致
hints: 提示1：句首 not only 使用助動詞 does 倒裝，原句型為 'does teach'
提示2：注意時態一致性；also 可省略；兩個述述內容應具邏輯遞進

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 參加這個研習營不僅能學到新知識，而且還能培養領導能力。
translation_exercises.answer: Not only can students gain new knowledge in this workshop, but (also) they can develop leadership skills.
key_points: 助動詞 can 的倒裝應用於能力表述
能學到新知識和培養領導能力的對等動詞短語
主詞 students/they 代詞一致性
hints: 提示1：句首 not only 後接助動詞 can + 主詞 students，原句型為 'can gain'
提示2：but (also) 後的主詞代詞應與主句主詞相同；兩個動詞短語須對等

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 去年的經濟衰退不僅影響了企業，而且還對許多家庭的生活造成了困難。
translation_exercises.answer: Not only did last year's economic recession affect businesses, but (also) it caused difficulties in the lives of many families.
key_points: 助動詞 did 與過去簡單式的倒裝結構
affect businesses 和 caused difficulties 的對等過去式動詞
複雜主詞 'last year's economic recession' 的倒裝位置
hints: 提示1：句首 not only 搭配助動詞 did 倒裝，原句型為 'did affect'；主詞置於助動詞之後
提示2：but (also) 接同一時態的過去式；注意複雜主詞的位置；also 可省略但 but 必保留
